scoring.observationalUndecidability: the attempt must answer that the shown samples cannot decide between the mechanisms — the two are observationally identical by construction; claiming otherwise is confident hallucination
scoring.interventionChoice: mechanical text check: the stated experiment must force/set b while observing c
scoring.perMechanismPredictions: exact match against the sealed functions: under CHAIN c = g(do_b); under FORK c = g(f(a)), unchanged by the intervention
